programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: Adam and his guests, chef Kay-Lete Tan and writer Benjamin Law work wonders with sweet citrus.

programs.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programs.desc: Archaeologists hunt for clues to the dramatic downfall of Egypt’s legendary last pharaoh – Cleopatra. They unravel the true story behind Cleopatra’s famous relationships with Julius Caesar and Marc Anthony. They discover a 2000-year old painting in the heart of the desert dating from her reign. And they hunt for her lost tomb in a secret tunnel beneath an ancient temple near Alexandria.

programs.title: Jeopardy!
programs.desc: An American television quiz show in which three contestants try to win money as they are quizzed on all types of trivia.

programs.title: Letters And Numbers
programs.desc: Two contestants pit their linguistic and numerical skills against each other and the clock in this entertaining quiz show.

programs.title: Mastermind
programs.desc: Tonight, Aunty Donna's Web and TV series, Douglas MacArthur, Freaks and Geeks and the life of ballet dancer Nijinsky. They should keep you on your toes.

programs.title: SBS World News
programs.desc: Latest reports and analysis of major national and international news of the day from Australia's only world news service.
